title: Goldfish Care
description: What are the key factors that affect the lifespan of goldfish in different environments?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how to care for goldfish and wants to understand the various factors that influence their lifespan, such as tank size, cleanliness, and temperature, in order to provide the best possible conditions for their goldfish to thrive.

title: Wireless Tech
description: What are the key differences and applications of various wireless communication technologies such as Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC?
narrative: The user is looking for information that explains the unique characteristics, advantages, and use cases of different wireless technologies, including Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC, in order to make informed decisions about which technology to use in various scenarios, such as device connectivity, data transfer, and networking.

title: US Entry into WW1
description: What events led to the United States' decision to enter World War I?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the specific events and circumstances that prompted the United States to abandon its isolationist stance and enter World War I on the side of the Allies. Relevant documents should discuss key incidents, such as the sinking of the Lusitania, the resumption of unrestricted submarine warfare by Germany, and the Zimmerman telegram, as well as the political and diplomatic factors that influenced the US decision.

title: Mortgage Interest Rates
description: What factors affect the interest rates offered to borrowers for mortgages?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the key factors that influence the interest rates offered to borrowers for mortgages, including credit scores, loan terms, and market conditions, in order to make an informed decision when applying for a mortgage.

title: Lower Back Pain

narrative: The user is experiencing lower back pain accompanied by pain in the lower abdomen and is looking for information on potential underlying conditions, such as kidney stones, infections, or other serious health issues, as well as guidance on how to manage the pain and when to seek medical attention.

title: Health System Analysis
description: What are the key factors that influence the effectiveness of a health and safety management system in an organization?

title: Pneumonia Causes
description: What are the different causes of pneumonia and how do they lead to the condition?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the various factors that can lead to pneumonia, including bacterial, viral, fungal, and chemical causes, as well as the role of mycoplasmas and other microorganisms. title: Gray Genetics
